name: Spicy Sichuan Noodles (Dan Dan Mian)
recipeIngredient: 3/4 lb Chinese thin egg noodles (fresh or dry)
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the pork, dark soy sauce, and salt in a small bowl and mix well.
2. Heat a wok or saute pan until hot. Add the peanut oil and deep-fry the pork, stirring with a spatula to break it into small pieces. Cook for about 4 minutes until crispy and dry, then remove with a slotted spoon and drain on paper towels.
3. Pour off most of the oil, leaving 2 tablespoons in the wok. Reheat the wok briefly.
4. Add the garlic, ginger, and scallions, and stir-fry for 30 seconds.
5. Stir in the sesame paste, dark soy sauce, chili oil, salt, and chicken stock. Simmer for 4 minutes.
6. Cook the noodles in a large pot of boiling water for 2 minutes if fresh or 5 minutes if dried. Drain well in a colander.
7. Divide the cooked noodles into individual bowls or serve in a large soup tureen. Ladle the sauce over the top.
